use-ai-generated-descriptions.label: Use AI generated descriptions
use-ai-generated-descriptions.info:
Enable AI-generated descriptions for saved pages. Turning this on will download a large AI model (takes approximately 5-15 minutes depending on your connection) and use a significant amount of storage.

For best results, first time, enable this feature on a stable, unmetered network (e.g., Wi-Fi).
use-ai-generated-descriptions.error:
The AI model download is taking longer than expected or may have stalled. First, try closing and reopening the extension. If that doesn't help, restart your browser.

Afterward, go back to Settings and check whether the download resumes or starts again.

If the issue persists, uninstall the AI model via chrome://on-device-internals/, then restart your browser. The download should start again afterward.
